posts.text:
So funny how both Louis Theroux and Ben Shapiro said its antisemitic to claim satanists control the world

If the shoe fits
What an end to the Trump dynasty that his only supporters left are some of his own children, chabad lubavitch rabbis, and Laura Loomer.

I was banned on Youtube 3 years for saying this


All day Astronomy (@forallcurious)

🚨: U.S. cancels mRNA vaccine development, stating it has 'more risks than benefits'.







— https://nitter.net/forallcurious/status/2034366988219556084#m

You can love your country but being overly patriotic is the equivalent of a sports fanboy season ticket holder cheering on men who don’t know you exist

You did not choose where you were born
You are not responsible for your ancestor’s achievements

Let go of unwarranted pride

A bunch of fans at a mosque in Bosnia showed love to SNEAKO on Eid ❤️🇧🇦

Video

Ben does not seem to realize just how far past America is from the fear of “antisemitism.” Nobody cares for an Epstein apologist moral policing while we go to war for his country. Candace Owens will continue to humiliate his numbers if he doesn’t adapt past 2016 talking points.


SNEAKO UPDATES (@Sneak0o)

Ben Shapiro just dissed SNEAKO and called him a moron that “hates on the Jews”😭💀

Video
  





— https://nitter.net/Sneak0o/status/2035051927122346272#m

Tomorrow night on Bosnian news Face TV 
Bajrambarećula 🇧🇦



Video

I hope to return to Bosnia again soon
Truly a hidden gem of light in this world

Unfortunately I’m sick and can’t properly do anything so I fly back to NYC tonight

Bajram barećula 🇧🇦



Video

A Bosnian uncle at the mosque praises SNEAKO for his content and says he’s on the right path 🙌🇧🇦

“I find your videos very interesting. I think you’re doing a good job. May God make it spiritually prosperous for you.”

Video

It’s due time the far left and far right unite and focus on the common enemy

Notice how nobody talks about ICE or trans people anymore

These are divisive issues planted to keep the goyim bickering while they nuke the world

Shut up about your isms already.

Aura ngl


Breaking911 (@Breaking911)

🚨 EXPLOSIVE: Mamdani's wife is not only a rabid anti-Semite Islamic fanatic, but she's also homophobic, and uses the "N" word.

Oh, and she also volunteered to be a suicide bomber "If it does good for my cause, I’ll be happy to accept death.”

@NYCMayor comment?

Happy Ramadan!









— https://nitter.net/Breaking911/status/2034699336336941159#m

Al-Aqsa is closed on Eid for the first time since 1967 because Mossad planted 9/11 style bombs there. After the explosion they will blame it on Iran. 

It is not about freeing gays and prostitutes, this war is so jews can build the third temple and summon the Anti-Christ.

Eid in Bosnia 🇧🇦

Video

W stream Bosnia is a special place 🇧🇦
Going to sleep finally after weeks 
Will update next stream when I’m up
